title: Festive Nutcracker Christmas Coir Door Mat 45 x 75cm – Durable Printed Coconut Fibre Doormat Merry Christmas Design & Non-Slip Backing for Indoor & Outdoor Use
features: DURABLE COIR MATERIAL – Made from 100% natural coconut coir, this eco-friendly doormat is robust and resilient, designed to withstand daily foot traffic and keep dirt outside.
CHARMING NUTCRACKER DESIGN – Featuring a vibrant printed nutcracker pattern with a cheerful “Merry Christmas” greeting, this doormat adds warmth and festive spirit to any entrance.
NON-SLIP PVC BACKING – Equipped with a secure non-slip PVC backing, this mat stays firmly in place, providing safety and stability at your doorstep, ideal for busy households.
LARGER SIZE FOR MAXIMUM COVERAGE – Measuring 45 x 75cm, this mat offers ample coverage for most doorways, creating a welcoming feel while keeping indoor spaces cleaner.
PERFECT FOR XMAS ENTHUSIASTS – A festive essential for families, couples, and Christmas lovers who enjoy seasonal decor, this mat enhances the holiday atmosphere at home.
description: Product description Add a touch of festive cheer to your home with this charming Christmas Nutcracker Coir Door Mat. Measuring 45x75cm, this decorative doormat is perfect for welcoming guests and creating a cosy, inviting atmosphere throughout the holiday season. Made from 100% natural coconut coir, this mat is not only eco-friendly but also durable and tough, designed to trap dirt effectively before it enters your home. The classic nutcracker design, along with the joyful “Merry Christmas” greeting, adds a timeless seasonal touch, making it a stylish addition to any entryway. This Christmas door mat is equipped with a secure PVC non-slip backing, ensuring it stays firmly in place, even in wet or snowy weather, providing added safety and stability at your doorstep. It’s perfect for households with high foot traffic and a must-have for families, couples, or anyone who loves decorating for Christmas. The slightly larger size of 45x75cm offers ample coverage, keeping your entryway clean while brightening up your home’s exterior. Designed to be both weather-resistant and easy to clean, this mat is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, making it versatile for porches, hallways, and entryways. Simply shake or brush off dirt and debris to keep it looking fresh and vibrant throughout the festive season. Make a statement this Christmas with a doormat that combines function, style, and holiday charm, perfect for anyone looking to add a traditional yet lively feel to their seasonal decor. Safety Warning Non-slip backing may not prevent all slips and falls. Use caution when walking on the mat, especially when wet. This product is made from natural coconut coir, which may cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Always test a small area before full use.
